positive: A symmetrical celestial botanical mandala, featuring interwoven tropical flora (lotus petals, monstera leaves, fern fronds) and cosmic elements (crescents, stylized constellations). The style is highly detailed, minimalist line art combined with bold, flat color blocking. Composition is perfectly centered and radial, designed for seamless repetition or a single, striking print on fabric. Use a color palette of deep indigo, teal, muted gold, and stark white. Strong contrast and clean silhouettes are paramount. Studio shot, vector quality, high resolution, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, grainy, lowres, ugly, amateur, text, watermark, signature, logo, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, muted, dull, photorealistic, 3d render
